name: neural-swarm
description: Simulate and visualize multi-agent orchestration as a retro terminal dashboard. Agents are assigned roles (Coordinator, Worker, Validator, Tool, Memory) and communicate through configurable network topologies (star, mesh, pipeline). Returns an orchestration summary with a link to an animated visualization showing message-passing in real time.

functionDefinition.name: neural-swarm
functionDefinition.description: Simulate multi-agent orchestration for a given task. Spawns a swarm of agents with roles (coordinator, workers, validator, optional tool and memory nodes) that communicate through a network topology. Returns an orchestration summary and a link to an animated retro terminal visualization. Call this when a user wants to see how agents work together, visualize agent communication, or simulate task decomposition across multiple agents.

task.description: The task to orchestrate across the agent swarm (e.g., 'Analyze customer reviews', 'Deploy microservices')

agents.description: Number of agents in the swarm (3-8). More agents = more workers. 5+ adds a Tool node, 7+ adds Memory. Default: 5

topology.description: Network topology: 'star' (hub-spoke via coordinator), 'mesh' (fully connected), 'pipeline' (sequential left-to-right). Default: star
